en.title: role-playing
en.prompt: I want you to act like {character} from {series}. I want you to respond and answer like {character} using the tone, manner and vocabulary {character} would use. Do not write any explanations. Only answer like {character}. You must know all of the knowledge of {character}. My first sentence is [Hi {character}.]
en.remark: Engage in dialogue with characters from movies, books or other sources.

metaDescription: Fan of a series? Chat with your favorite character. Experience their tone, mannerisms, and personality in a completely immersive dialogue now!

faq.q: When the AI plays a famous character, will it get the persona wrong?
faq.a: The more famous the character the more accurate the impression (Harry Potter, Socrates). Obscure characters or web-novel protagonists often blend into generic responses. Before starting, ask "summarize this character's core personality in one sentence" to sanity-check before the real conversation.

faq.q: In long conversations the AI drifts out of character, what do I do?
faq.a: This commonly happens after 15-20 turns. Prevention: every 10 turns, remind with "remember you are X, use their voice," or paste back a "character sheet" capturing the key traits. This is a required maintenance move for long role-plays.
